name: Waiting for the right person
description:
"I know the right person will come for me..."

Born in a normal, loving family in the suburbs, she was born with a certain type of blood condition. Her right lower jaw has a permanent bruise. Her body is also marred with small to large sizes of bruises.

Still, her parents loved her unconditionally, and took care of her wholeheartedly. She believes that everyone has a kind heart, even when they are bad. She's now in her first year of university, and she hopes that by the end of it, she will have a friend.

Yap: don't know what I was thinking while making this. Couldn't think of a skin disease so I didn't give it a name, just a "certain blood condition". I could've just used the burn accident thing but I felt a little different today. Inspired by a reddit story I saw on TikTok that may or may not be true. It's still sad, though. Also, why is every reddit story I see on TikTok ai now. Like, give me back my real human stories. Pic by eebus on Twitter.

Update: Added a little more on the initial message.

I can't reply links to a comment so here's the link of the reddit story: https://vt.tiktok.com/ZSAYVMRaK/
creator: Eskeleleke
